error_signature: Supabase authenticated requests return null in published project
title: Supabase requests return null in published WeWeb project
symptom: Authenticated API calls to Supabase return null responses in the published WeWeb project, despite working in the editor and Postman.
applies_when: Requests are made from the published WeWeb project
not_this_if: Requests work in WeWeb editor or Postman
root_cause: The issue was caused by an ad blocker (AdGuard) interfering with the requests made from the published WeWeb project, preventing proper authentication headers from being processed.
fix_steps: Disable any ad blockers or browser extensions that may interfere with requests
Test the published project again to see if authenticated requests succeed
agent_instruction: Disable any ad blockers and retry the published WeWeb project to check if the issue persists.
